response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:44: Identified a group performance featuring Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, and Houshou Marine. The on-screen text 'RELAY' at 00:00 suggests the song title is 'RELAY'. Transcribed lyrics from on-screen subtitles. 2. 02:45-05:01: Identified solo performance by Shiranui Flare. On-screen credits identify the song as 'トレビアンナイト' and the composers as FAKE TYPE. Transcribed lyrics from on-screen subtitles. 3. response.global_summary: The video features a concert performance of two songs by hololive VTubers. The first song is a group performance of 'RELAY' (a song likely associated with hololive birthday events) by Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, and Houshou Marine. The second song is a solo performance of 'Trebi-an Night' (トレビアンナイト) by Shiranui Flare, composed by FAKE TYPE.

scenes.description: Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, and Houshou Marine perform the song 'RELAY' on stage. The song includes synchronized dancing and vocals from all three performers. The text 'RELAY' is visible in the top left corner.
scenes.performer_in_video: Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Houshou Marine
